app.title: NoOBS
app.tagline: Lightweight screen recorder with OBS Studio embedded

sources.btMicWarn: Warning: while this Bluetooth microphone is connected and NoOBS is open (even without selecting it to record — the level meters already open access to the mic), Windows keeps the headset in the HFP profile. The device's audio quality drops to mono 8 or 16 kHz and the volume usually goes to maximum. Bluetooth Classic limitation — unchecking here won't fix it. To restore HD, disable or disconnect the device in Windows, or use a separate USB microphone.
sources.btSpeakerWarn: Warning: Bluetooth speaker. When any app on Windows accesses a Bluetooth microphone (including NoOBS's level meters), this device automatically drops to phone-call quality (mono 8 or 16 kHz) and maximum volume. Bluetooth Classic limitation — for HD, disable the Bluetooth microphone in Windows, or use BT LE Audio (newer hardware + Windows 11).

record.needDevice: Enable at least one device (monitor, webcam, microphone or speaker) to start recording.

recordings.title: Recordings
recordings.lowSpaceHint: Disk space below 5 GB in the recordings folder. You may not be able to complete a recording without freeing up space.
recordings.confirmDeleteOne: Move this recording to the Windows Recycle Bin?
recordings.confirmDeleteN: Move {{count}} recordings to the Windows Recycle Bin?
recordings.confirmDeleteNamed: Move "{{name}}" to the Windows Recycle Bin?

language.label: Language
language.hint: Language of the NoOBS interface. "Automatic" uses the Windows language; other values force the selected language.

codec.label: Video codec
codec.hint: Automatic picks the best available option in the order H.264 hardware → H.264 software → AV1 hardware → HEVC hardware. Only choose manually if you know what you're doing.

hotkey.label: Global hotkey to start/stop recording
hotkey.hint: Check the desired modifiers (Ctrl, Shift, Alt, Win) and pick a main key. Examples: Pause or Ctrl+Shift+G.
hotkey.noKey: No hotkey set. Pick a main key (and optionally modifiers) to enable the global hotkey.
hotkey.activeHint: Current hotkey: {{spec}}. Uncheck all modifiers and pick Not set to disable.
hotkey.invalidSpec: Invalid hotkey — pick at least one main key (letter, number, F1-F12, Pause, etc).

reserved.ctrlAltDel: Ctrl+Alt+Del is the Windows secure attention sequence.
reserved.altTab: Alt+Tab is the Windows task switcher.
reserved.altF4: Alt+F4 closes the current window in Windows.
reserved.altEsc: Alt+Esc cycles through windows in Windows.
reserved.altSpace: Alt+Space opens the window's system menu.
reserved.ctrlEsc: Ctrl+Esc opens the Windows Start menu.
reserved.winE: Win+E opens File Explorer in Windows.
reserved.winR: Win+R opens the Windows Run box.
reserved.winX: Win+X opens the Windows power user menu.
reserved.winA: Win+A opens the Windows Action Center.
reserved.winM: Win+M minimizes all windows in Windows.
reserved.winP: Win+P opens the Windows projection picker.
reserved.winV: Win+V opens the Windows clipboard history.
reserved.winG: Win+G opens the Windows Game Bar.
reserved.winU: Win+U opens the Windows Ease of Access Center.
reserved.winB: Win+B focuses the Windows system tray.
reserved.winArrows: Win+Arrows controls window snapping in Windows.
reserved.winPeriod: Win+. opens the Windows emoji picker.
reserved.winSemicolon: Win+; opens the Windows emoji picker.
reserved.winShiftS: Win+Shift+S opens the Windows Snipping tool.

hint.-2: Aggressive compression — much smaller files, visibly lower quality.
hint.-1: Moderate compression — smaller files, slightly lower quality.
hint.0: Default — same as encoder defaults, balanced between file size and visual quality.
hint.1: High quality — larger files, sharper video.
hint.2: Maximum quality — large files, close to visually lossless.

hint.low: {{fps}} fps — low framerate, motion may look choppy. Smaller files.
hint.smooth: {{fps}} fps — smooth, standard video rate. Compact files.
hint.good: {{fps}} fps — good fluidity, great for general use.
hint.high: {{fps}} fps — high fluidity, ideal for games and fast motion.
hint.veryHigh: {{fps}} fps — very high fluidity. Larger files.

autostart.label: Start with Windows
autostart.hint: NoOBS launches automatically when you log into Windows.

closeToTray.label: Minimize to tray
closeToTray.hint: Lets NoOBS use the system tray icon. With this option enabled, the window's X button sends to tray instead of quitting — click the icon to reopen, or use the icon's menu to actually quit.

minimizeOnRecord.labelTray: Minimize to tray when recording starts
minimizeOnRecord.hintTray: When a recording starts, the NoOBS window is sent to the system tray — useful for recording the screen without the app's own window appearing in the video. The global hotkey still works to stop.
minimizeOnRecord.hintTaskbar: When a recording starts, the NoOBS window is minimized — useful for recording the screen without the app's own window appearing in the video. The global hotkey still works to stop.

notifyOnRecord.label: Show Windows notification on record start/stop
notifyOnRecord.hint: Shows a Windows notification when a recording starts or finishes. Only useful when the window is automatically minimized — otherwise the recording state is already visible in the window.

scrollLock.label: Blink Scroll Lock LED while recording
scrollLock.hint: Blinks the keyboard's Scroll Lock LED (1Hz) while a recording is active — discreet, always-visible indicator, useful when the app is in the tray. Turns off automatically when stopped.

playSound.label: Play start/stop recording sound
playSound.hint: Plays a short two-note sequence when starting (ascending) and stopping (descending) a recording — discreet audible confirmation.

stopOnLock.label: Stop recording when computer is locked
stopOnLock.hint: When you lock Windows (Win+L, switch user, or automatic lock), the ongoing recording is finalized — avoids accidentally recording long sessions when you step away.

hibernate.label: Free memory after 1 minute in tray
hibernate.hint: When the app stays in the tray for over 1 minute without recording, releases all resources and stays at ~5 MB of RAM. Only available with 'Minimize to tray' enabled.

buttons.resetTitle: Restore all fields to defaults (does not save — you still need to click Save)

about.title: About NoOBS
about.tagline: Lightweight screen recorder with OBS Studio embedded
about.intro1: NoOBS was born out of frustration with the complexity of OBS Studio — configuring scenes, sources and devices for every recording.
about.intro2: The idea here is simplicity: open, click Record, you're recording. Displays, webcam, microphones and system audio are detected and ready automatically.
about.intro3: Lightweight, fast, intuitive — a premium product designed so your recording always just works.
features: Separate audio tracks — mic and each output as its own track in the MKV
GPU acceleration: AV1, HEVC, H.264 (NVIDIA / AMD / Intel) with CPU x264 fallback
Configurable global hotkey to start/stop from anywhere
Hibernate mode: ~5 MB of RAM when idle in the tray
MKV container — recording recoverable even after power loss
Built-in player with thumbnails, search and delete right in the UI
builtWith: libobs (OBS Studio core) — recording, encoder and capture
FFmpeg — remux, track extraction and thumbnails
about.footer: Free software based on OBS Studio (GPL v2+), FFmpeg (LGPL/GPL) and Microsoft's WebView2.

toast.fieldsResetBody: Click Save to apply the changes.
toast.restoreConfirmMessage: This will reset all fields to their default values. You still need to click Save to apply. Continue?

error.cantChangeSourcesWhileRecording: Can't change video sources while recording.

warning.canvasOverflow: Combined display resolution exceeds the codec limit ({{max}} × {{max}}). The recording will be scaled down proportionally. Switch to AV1 or HEVC in Settings to record up to 8192 × 8192.

tracks.title: Audio tracks
tracks.defaultHint: Device set as default in Windows. Indicated by a colored dot next to the device name in the list.
tracks.mixHint: Mix of all enabled devices. Recorded as the first audio track of the output file.

banner.body: The list will update as soon as you stop recording.
